Flow.description: Added LOI Date to the datatable columns

formulas.name: SOQL_Contract
formulas.expression: "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Lease_Start_Date_New__c, leaseworks__Lease_End_Date_New__c, leaseworks__Operator_New__c, leaseworks__Lease_Type_Status__c FROM leaseworks__Lease__c WHERE Id = '" + {!pro_Assets_In_Deal_Datatable.outputSelectedRow.leaseworks__Aircraft__r.leaseworks__Lease__c} + "'"

Flow.label: Asset In Deal - Datatable ScreenFlow

value.stringValue: Name:122, pro_Expected_BAC_Approval_Date__c:184, BAC_Approval_Date__c:126, pro_LOI_Date_Formula__c:79, pro_Company_Board_Approval_Date_Formula__c:199, pro_Target_Contracting_Date_Formula__c:157, pro_Scheduled_Delivery_Date_Formula__c:160, pro_Final_Delivery_Date_Formula__c:124, pro_Actual_Delivery_Date_Formula__c:135

pro_Expected_BAC_Approval_Date__c:Expected BAC Approval, BAC_Approval_Date__c:BAC Approval, pro_LOI_Date_Formula__c:LOI, pro_Company_Board_Approval_Date_Formula__c:Company Board Approval, pro_Target_Contracting_Date_Formula__c:Target Contracting, pro_Scheduled_Delivery_Date_Formula__c:Scheduled Delivery, pro_Final_Delivery_Date_Formula__c:Final Delivery, pro_Actual_Delivery_Date_Formula__c:Actual Delivery
